title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, essential oils helps with oily hair because of its natural astringent and antiseptic properties. It has the ability to regulate the scalp's oil production, reducing excessive sebum and promoting a balanced environment for hair growth. Additionally, sage essential oil's antimicrobial properties help to eliminate dirt and impurities from the scalp, leaving hair looking cleaner and healthier.
